creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 3 Jul 2007, nst wrote:

> kernel: lock order reversal:
> kernel: 1st 0xc3280090 inp (divinp) @ /usr/src/sys/modules/ipdivert/../../netinet/ip_divert.c:356
> kernel: 2nd 0xc0bf0018 PFil hook read/write mutex (PFil hook read/write mutex) @ /usr/src/sys/net/pfil.c:73


This looks very similar to
http://sources.zabbadoz.net/freebsd/lor.html#181

-- 
Bjoern A. Zeeb                                 bzeeb at Zabbadoz dot NeT
Software is harder than hardware  so better get it right the first time.
